Ngh... How can I be forced to dine with filthy demons...?
Ah! Hello, Miss Demon! How fare you today?
The Royal Castle opens its doors to the commonfolk once a month.
It's to show the people their rulers think of them.
However, we've had some people go missing recently. The Empire's
investigating, but nothing's been found yet.
The people who went missing... They were found murdered.
Unbelievable! This must be propaganda the demons are spreading!

How strange... No matter how hard I tried, human kings would
never entertain my attempts to talk...

Dear, please calm down. If it comes down to it, I'll...
I was prepared to sacrifice myself to the demons if I had to,
if it would help my husband...
However, the demons told me they had no use for me. They said I
should concentrate on supporting my husband instead.
People say the demons are a plague, spreading pain all across the
land, but now that I've met them, I know that's not true at all.
My audience is supposed to be next, but they're not calling me
forward! I've been here for hours already! Hurry it up!
How dare those demons make me wait like this! I'm a human!
Wh-What do I do!? My master's so irritated! If I speak to him now,
Master's angry again. I'll have to do my best not to catch his eye.
Otherwise, he'll take it out on me.
His Majesty Dorbeja is waiting in the throne room.
